name: Albatross Golf
about: Albatross Golf is a venue that provides indoor golf simulation experiences using state-of-the-art technology. They offer aboutGolf simulators, which are industry leaders known for their high accuracy and innovation, utilizing optical-based launch monitors that track shots from driving to putting. The venue operates on a per-simulator, per-hour pricing model with a one-hour minimum, making it a flexible option for groups to set their own time and share costs. It caters to a range of activities including casual play, leagues, and various event hosting, from team building to birthday parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Highly accurate optical-based launch monitor technology
Flexible per-simulator pricing, allowing cost sharing among groups
Versatile venue suitable for both practice and social events
Professional-grade aboutGolf simulators for a realistic experience
Available for leagues and various group events

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Optical-based launch monitors described as industry leaders

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own golf clubs to play at Albatross Golf, as they do not mention club rentals as a standard service.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of outside food or drink policies. The venue focuses on the golf experience without specifying catering or BYOB options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For league play, teams have a 2-hour block to complete their round. For casual play, the time depends on your reservation and the pace at which your group plays, with a one-hour minimum booking.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Albatross Golf appears to be kid-friendly, as they mention hosting family nights and other events that can include children.
